title: astragalus lepidus
intro: Astragalus lepidus, also known as small flower milkvetch or woolly milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lepidus include immune system support, anti-aging properties, and the potential to reduce the severity of certain respiratory conditions. Astragalus lepidus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal supplements and traditional medicine.
